calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Ming Yu Wu (petitioner/executor).

The court stated that it left this on calendar to see if anyone would appear to object. There being no objections, the First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Continued To Sep-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-15-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-10-2024 Continued To Jul-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-08-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Ming Yu Wu.

The court stated that it is very confused by all of the facts in this case and all of the filings, that there is a conflict on the issue of who is the trustee, that there is a question that Frank Chew's estate order was wrong, and that it is inclined to take this petition off calendar and have Mr. Bresler put all of it in a new petition that lines it all out for the court. Mr. Bresler stated that he presented numbers to match the guidance he received, that he had a dead trustee, that he got a waiver of the accounting from the executor and the person who replaced the trustee. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver Account, etc. is continued to June 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Nguyen. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Continued To May-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Continued To Mar-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-18-2023 Continued To Feb-26-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared via zoom for Miny Yu Wu (executor).

Mr. Bresler stated that he filed a supplemental declaration and final report in the morning, that $96,243.00 was paid to federal tax and $21,818.00 was paid to state tax, thus leaving cash balance of $155,000.00, and that the signature of the petitioner inadvertently omitted but an amended petition was filed to remedy it. The matter is continued to February 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Continued To Dec-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Bresler appeared by zoom for Ming Yu Wu (executor).

Mr. Bresler stated that he looked at the notes for August 7th which shows that the matter was continued and that he confused this case with the Frank Chew case. The court does not find good cause and sanctions Mr. Bresler in the amount of $250.00 payable within 10 days. Mr. Bresler stated that this case stems from a misstatement from the Frank Chew case, that he sent papers to the executor for signature, but he only got a receipt on distribution in the Frank estate and that he thinks it will resolve this case. The court noted that the inventory and appraisal shows a final distribution from the Frank estate. Mr. Bresler provided a breakdown of $165,724.00 in cash, $9,645.00 for the bond, $21,000.00 for debts and $240.00 for the Franchise Tax Board. The order to show cause and the order to appear are off calendar. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to December 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Xiao. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-07-2023 Continued To Oct-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Ming Yu Wu (executor) to appear on October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 regarding suspension of executor. An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Peter Breseler (attorney) to appear on October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against him for failure to appear and regarding suspension of the executor. Written response to be filed by October 06, 2023. First and final report of executor on waiver on account etc., is also continued to October 16, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 17, 2017 is admitted to probate. Ming Yu Wu is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
